subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! This servant writeth this reply on behalf of the candle of God's love, Jináb-i-Manshádí, concerning the tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان این عبد از قبل شمع محبت الله جناب منشادی جواب مینگارد اخبار
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @spiritual transformation, @importance of community building, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
